title: Heterogeneity of antiphospholipid antibody profiles in a clinical cohort and association with distinct clinical features.
author: Shen Z Yang S Jin S Liu Q Wang H Nie Y Guo H Cui L
content:
S-EPMC12766841 PMC12766841 Heterogeneity of antiphospholipid antibody profiles in a clinical cohort and association with distinct clinical features.

Background

The diagnosis of antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) uses standard antibodies (lupus anticoagulant (LAC), anticardiolipin antibodies
